subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope and my Refuge and my Hope! With all humility and contrition I supplicate unto the Kingdom of Thy sanctity and the luminous horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و ملجای و رجائی انی بکل ذل و انکسار ابتهل الی ملکوت قدسک و افق نیر
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @prayer for purity; chastity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @goodly deeds; actions
